heroSection.desc: a skilled Flutter Mobile Developer with expertise in building high-performance apps, specializing in clean architecture, Riverpod state management, and API integrations. Currently working at PT Aesthetic Technology Indonesia, I creates solutions for the beauty clinic industry, with plans for future healthcare sector expansion.

aboutSection.desc: I am a professional in the field of information technology with experience in software development. Since starting my career in the IT world, I have been involved in various projects that help companies and clients improve operational efficiency through technology-driven solutions. I am passionate about continuous learning and personal development, and I aim to contribute my best to every project I work on. With over 2 years of experience, I possess skills in project management, software development, and implementing innovative technology solutions.

desc: A digital Quran application that offers complete features such as translations, audio recitations, prayer times, and Qibla direction to support daily worship, and is officially published on the Google Play Store.
A QR-based digital guest book application that allows users to check in via QR scanning or manual entry, and supports guest data printing for documentation purposes.
A business application designed to manage Purchase Orders (PO), Sales Orders (SO), Delivery Orders, and shipment tracking in an integrated system to streamline operational and distribution processes.

A customer service application that enables users to order products, book services, take digital queue numbers, track nearby locations, download digital membership cards, and receive real-time notifications within a single integrated platform.

contactSection.title: Let's Connect
contactSection.desc: I'm here to help. Whether you have questions or want to discuss how we can collaborate, feel free to reach out through any of the options below. I'm always ready to listen and provide the best solutions for your needs. Get in touch now, I'd love to hear your story!
